productDisplayName: Nike Men White Air Dictate Sports Shoes
description: Style noteGet more comfort and enjoyment out of your fitness training with the nike Air Dictate running shoes. Packed with performance features, the Nike Air Dictate is a great choice for your daily runs. These attractive light-as-air shoes are the perfect blend of style and comfort, designed to up your performance.Product DetailsBreathable sandwich mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathabilty and supportExtra heel support to lock the backfoot in place and protect it from injuriesPadded lining for a comfortable step in feel and a padded tongue and collar for added comfortLace-ups for snug Fit and to lock the foot in placeSwoosh logo on the sides to create a style statementAir cushioning unit in the phylon midsole guarantees a smooth and responsive rideMedial and lateral Air-Sole midsole units deliver supreme cushioningBRS 1000 durable rubber outsole for long-lasting wearWaffle-pattern grip for excellent tractionHeel crash pad helps reduce impacting shock and set the foot up for a smooth transitionTPU shank adds extra supportMaterial and CareMesh, syntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
